prompt:
Subject: A transparent portrait enjoying wind chimes on a summer veranda (engawa) / Japanese summer portrait

Character/Expression: Young woman with black hair, naturally wet-looking long hair, transparent and fresh white skin, delicate natural makeup, soft gaze like half-closed eyelids, slightly parted lips, quiet and elegant sexy expression.

Clothing/Pose: Pale ivory camisole-style summer dress, delicate lace around the chest and shoulders, thin and light fabric, sitting relaxedly on the veranda with legs naturally folded, one hand gently touching the wind chime's strip, the other hand supporting the body on the wooden floor.

Background/Light: Veranda of an old Japanese house, shoji screens, wooden pillars, garden surrounded by deep greenery, green maple leaves, quiet courtyard with stones and water, summer sunlight shining through the veranda, creating soft dappled light patterns on skin, clothes, and wooden floor.

Composition/Camera: Vertical composition, character placed slightly right of center, summer-like composition with wind chimes at the top of the frame, 85mm portrait lens, shallow depth of field, high-definition depiction of face, eyes, hair, and lace of the costume, with garden greenery softly blurred.

Texture/Style: Hyper-realistic, 4K quality, high definition, natural skin texture visible down to pores and grain, white fresh transparent skin, delicate depiction of each hair strand and thin fabric texture, soft tones like Japanese film photography, sophisticated lifestyle photography, warm and calm summer atmosphere.

Negative: Low quality, blurred face, unnatural face, unnatural hands, extra fingers, missing fingers, distorted fingers, unnatural legs, distorted legs, strange gaze, asymmetrical eyes, broken face, distorted body, broken clothes, excessive processing, excessive skin correction, excessive exposure, vulgar expression, AI-specific unnatural texture, text, logo, watermark
